creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
For example, <https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=confctl&sektion=1&manpath=freebsd-ports> reference to: 

<https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=sysctl&sektion=8&apropos=0&manpath=FreeBSD+Ports+13.2>

> Sorry, no data found for `sysctl(8)'. Please try a keyword search. 

The keyword search will find the page, but I wonder whether we can enhance the in-page logic – for cross-references to have what's below appended to the relevant part of the URL.


+and+Ports
